hooks.prompt: Check if a TOGAF ADM project context file exists at .claude/togaf-adm.local.md. If it exists, read it and silently load the project context (project name, organisation, current phase, completed phases). Then greet the user with a brief one-line status: 'TOGAF project: [project_name] | Phase: [current_phase] | Ready.' If no context file exists, say nothing — do not prompt the user to create one unless they initiate a togaf command.
